pageDescription: Fill in the key information, upload photos and publish your property professionally on MyHome24App.
loginRequired: Please sign in first to create listings.

form.infoSubtitle: Fill in the most important details. You can add more later.
form.titlePlaceholder: Bright 3-room apartment in the city center

location.title: Location
location.subtitle: Enter the property address and place it on the map.

photos.title: Upload photos
photos.subtitle: Good photos increase visibility and improve the first impression.
photos.uploadHint: JPG, PNG, WEBP · maximum 10 images · max 8 MB per file

review.title: Review everything
review.subtitle: Check all details before publishing your listing.

tips.title: Tips for better listings
tips.tip1: Use a clear and precise title.
tips.tip2: Describe the location, condition and highlights of the property.
tips.tip3: Upload bright, sharp photos in good quality.
tips.tip4: Carefully review price, size and address before publishing.

toast.noMapboxToken: No Mapbox token configured for geocoding.
toast.geocodeServer: Address could not be located automatically (server response).
toast.geocodeNoResult: Address could not be located automatically (no result).
toast.geocodeNetwork: Address could not be located automatically (network error).
toast.maxImages: A maximum of {{count}} images is allowed.
toast.imageTooLarge: One image is larger than {{max}} MB.
toast.mustBeLoggedInPhotos: You must be signed in to upload photos.
toast.photoUploadFailed: A photo could not be uploaded.
toast.fillRequired: Please fill in all required fields.
